name: Sydney Abouna
description: Sydney is the visionary founder of Arbre Bio Africa, Arbre Bio Côte d'Ivoire and the Organic Tree Group. Driven by a passion for transforming African agriculture, Sydney leads every aspect of the company — from operations and project management to strategic partnerships and innovation. With hands-on expertise in precision agriculture, greenhouse technology and modern irrigation, Sydney is building the #1 agricultural innovation company in Africa.
